title: Eggs+
body:
Eggs+ adds new egg-based foods alongside a new mob.

## Features🥚:
- 🥚6 new food items
- 🥚New bottle of eggs potion
- 🥚Thrown eggs now produce raw eggs. Raw eggs can be cooked to prepare new foods.
- 🥚A new mob to that seeks revenge for your crimes an eggmanity.


![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/969151a11985372d6474413c801ce8589c951d46.png)
